author: Flippy
msg:
0.30 is by far not achievable for everyone. Based on reviewing 100s of licenses and setups/uptimes etc. It shows that the current tasks requires ultra high uptime to get max rewards. This is simply impossible for people who might be interested in earning 0.2 or 0.3 per day.

People who can afford a decent internet connection and willing to keep device up and running 95%+ are almost non existent apart from us and some of our friends and fam.

Currently unity asks for high- end connections with extreme poverty level rewards. In addition they killed multi device setups, even up to 5 gets reduced rewards drastically.
Unworkable for UNOs.

author: Flippy
msg: [Photo] For example.

author: Flippy
msg:
From what I have gathered, I see following results for single ULOs:

Top Tier rewards: 95% uptime and higher

Mid Tier rewards: 85% to 95% uptime (approx 50% lower rewards than Top tier)

Low Tier rewards: 65% to 85% uptime (approx 50% lower rewards than mid Tier)

Bottom tier: Below 65% uptime (rewards near zero)

author: Compost Man Unity code: XY
msg: I'm seeing the same thing. Uptime to rewards relationship certainly isn't linear at the moment. Home setup has between 7 to 11 phones depending on people's movements. At this level they get about a 50% reduction. For licences which are run by people I know in single phone households they get maximum rewards. For licences taken from the marketplace, even with 95% uptime, they usually get a penny.

author: Rick Middleton
msg:
I've seen a few people this morning mention that they are missing Unity Assistant's prescence in this chat. 

As someone who has been doing chat moderation for years - perhaps I might have some perspective to offer...

In some ways this role is a bit like a 'customer services' desk in a store.   People very rarely pop in to say "good job".   They come to complain about problems.

It can be incredibly challenging to deal with this day in day out.. customers often get frustrated.   Physical stores often have "we will not tolerate any abuse towards our staff" signs to try and mitigate this - but it does not entirely help.

Chats like this have rules to prevent swearing or whatever as an attempt to help mitigate the problem.. but it does not entirely help.

I very rarley mute or restrict anyone in WM chats ( well apart from a hundred scamers a day 🤩) - but when I do it is usually because the person has asked a question - gets an answer - does not like the answer - asks the question again in a different way - gets the answer - does not like the answer.. ( repeat ad nauseum 🤮️️️️️️)

If somone in chat is doing this or similar behaviour..  where i am trying my best to do my job - and they are arguing incessantly - after a while this can become stressful for me.. once this has happened it might start to affect my ability to my job properly.

I try to discuss problem and not to mute or ban people, so I often leave it too late before warning people for asking the same question repeatedly.

OK.. that all make sense?  Good.

Now. imagine you are a dev, cto, or ceo.   You have some very important things to do in your job..   and maybe sometimes you might post in the chats to engage with the community.

What I see all too often is them instanlty get bombarded with WEN THIS?  WEN THAT?  YOU SAID THIS?

At which point they will start to regret posting in the the group.. and will only come back when they are ready for an onslaught - and onslaught which might be stresful and prevent them from doing the rest of their job properly.

Imagine going off to a meeting to negotiate with partners for example.

**TLDR:  Want to speak to Unity Assistant or team members?  If yes then have some common decency when talking to them.. they are humans trying their best.**

author: Jouni Kuisma
msg:
I don’t think anyone’s purpose in here is trying to be difficult. People would just like to have more info more frequently. Also, if people are worried, they naturally want to have answers. If someone says repeatedly that things are going to be ok soon (or in 7 days for example) and then nothing seems to happen after a week or two and then the same repeats, and there is no explanation for the delay, it tends to make people even more worried. I think (although I might be wrong) that people would feel more comfortable if there was more info and if there were some kind of explanations why things were delayed. And ok, it might be better for the team to answer in AMAs if that suits their timetable better. However, not everyone can take part in those and it seems that the hashtag for amaquestions doesn’t work. Or at least not for all questions. 
People are worried. I am worried too. If we don’t see progress (also with the rewards) or have knowledge, we tend to worry. At least I do. I have already waited many years with WM and lost a lot of money with MELD. Don’t wanna live either case again. With all the war and uncertainty in the World it can’t be a surprise that people are worried. So without wanting to cause any kind of hassle, I ask the team or the assistant or the mods to understand that people are scared. I have said this earlier and our generous mods have replied to me in here (thank you for that). However, as long as the team stays silent and things are delayed again and again without explanation it gives an impression that they don’t care. I am sure that it isn’t so, but that is the impression. Sorry about that. And Sorry about this long opening but I really really want (and need) this to work. But as I said I am scared.

author: redman
msg:
This is the main problem: not even that targets are missed, but that they are missed and they don’t even think they should inform the community. A simple 'Hey guys, x, y, z issues popped up and a result we won’t meet our target, here’s a new target date. Apologies' would suffice. Honesty and transparency go a long way toward maintaining trust.
To turn this around and make it look like the community is simply complaining because they aren’t making money is just insulting.

author: Page Øne
msg:
Hey Rick big fan of your work and what you do !  I agree with you that the team only should be active when they have something important to mention. I really dont care if they are active or not here as the mods are doing a great job for being in the middle person. I dont believe that team members should be here 24/7 however i would mention i like Mickeys approach. 

Secondly you cant complain about people asking when, the most problem is and are coming from the following
- Roadmap not being met
- tasks being pushed every 2 weeks
so its frustrating and annoying for a lot of people here, in AMA they all yell soon 5-7 days after that its crickets.

I prefer honesty if you are not able to deliver than just say it, dont keep pushing the date as this feels like a looney toones  episode where the goalpost is being moved just before touchdown

Like i said I dont care if the team is here or not, Its nice to have, mods are doing wonderfull job @CalusB  @ValaykaWBC  are trying to be helpful as much as they can ( you dont need to agree with them all the time sometimes i would love to strangle them with love)

author: Dave
msg:
My whole farmbox (19 devices) just pooped out "Attestation failure. Please reinstall the application from an official source."

It never was installed from an unofficial source, but well...

I started to work on 1 device:
1) I restarted the app multiple times - didn't work.
2) I restarted the device - didn't work.
3) I reinstalled the app - didn't work.
4) I revoked my licenses, created new lease, connected that - didn't work.
5) I reset th device to factory settings, reinstalled the app, connect a new lease - didn't work.

What the hell? What else can I do now?

author: Kay | Will never DM you first
msg:
This only happens when the OS and Google/Apple services cannot validate the application integrity. Ensure Google services are installed on the phone. In the case of Apple, ensure the latest supported iOS version is installed - If this still persists, let us know the Make/Model/OS version, and in the case of Android, the OS "Flavour" - This should all be available in the settings menu of the device.

author: Val | WhiteBridge Noderunners | MNT SN.VN.UN
msg:
I was all day “offline” 

Not even gonna ask if there are updates…
Pretty sure it’s still the same and yeah, I gotta say we can’t blame the community for their/our frustration!

My 2 cents… As I see it the community isn’t asking for the team to come online, there is a team account aka Assistant… where is he?

And I also think is is very fair for ppl to ask for clarification on multiple subjects
Redundant answers will only create even more discontent!

There is a big gap between what the team considers good comms and what the community considers good comms, that’s a no brainer

Do I believe this is an amazing opportunity and project?
Hell yeah!

Is it going as “presented” 6 months ago? 
Hell no!

A “once in a month” AMA won’t suffice imho, maybe for the public on the outside but definitely NOT for UNOs, it is only fair that every single one in here gets clear information, even if that information is a setback or a delay, that is the only data for us to analyze progress!

Yes, us the UNOs that did put at least $5k into Unity

I’d like to ask all UNOs a bit of patience… and the @unityassistant /team to step up

author: Eddie H
msg:
Although I am not an earth node operator, I am very much aware that they have kept the EN community fully updated on the progress, set backs and challenges. From what I can tell EN holders feel informed and generally valued. 

I think the unity team needs to feel they can trust us to tell us when things are not quite working out. A large number of us have come from the world's mobile side and I would say we generally trust the team and the vision, hence why we brought the UNO nodes. 

I would like to call on the team to open up about the challenges and hurdles, so we can better understand. I think also we the community of UNO need to wipe the slate clean and to be honest be a bit less sarcastic.

author: Ricky
msg: My ipad is closing the app in minutes…and ChatGPT gave me the reason as “The 26.4.1 update specifically adjusted the **Energy Management Engine**. It now prioritizes "Total Suspension" for any app that hasn't registered a BGContinuedProcessingTask (a developer-level background permission). Since the Unity app is likely still optimizing its iOS support, it may not be requesting this permission correctly yet, causing the OS to "kill" it once the screen locks.” Can someone help, what to do? Also,@ValaykaWBC @unityassistant @defiants_kay can u pl take it up with team

author: Summer5372
msg:
#amaquestions 

1)  Is it possible to use same simcard bought earlier for Scouts and only claim top up? 

2) Will the support team be able to handle huge numbers of questions once we go live? Even though Uno's will have to communicate with Ulo's, the Uno's need to be able to react in a certain timeframe. No offence to support I know they work very hard!! 👊🏽💥

3) When a scout calls and a real person picks up, do we block them right away?

4) Is it possible to store recorded ama's in a certain area of discord so that we can listen back without searching for it?

5) Not being able to cash out could potentially harm Unity as a whole. Is there a way to prevent shortages in diverse cash options before we go live? 

6) Is it possible to hide the delete account button since it is irreversible?

@defiants_kay

 I forgot one...so i may add one more but will let you know if i do. Thanks Kay! 🤗
